cycle: N81 (re-fire of N70 after N71-A + N71-C land)

scope_note: Re-fire attempted per task spec after N71-A + N71-C land. Honest finding: N71-A landing on main is INCOMPLETE — repair commit 7671d7db wiped the PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32 constant declaration. Compiler source NOT touched per task constraint.

preconditions_verified.N71_A_commits_present: PARTIAL (9d21356c + 7671d7db both in git history, but 7671d7db REGRESSES nvptx_ptx_ops.hexa — wipes PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32)
preconditions_verified.N71_C_commit_present: YES (9652fd5e in history; not verified at silicon level — driver build blocked before PTX emit)

falsifiers.F-RFC071-E2E-DRIVER-BUILD: FAIL (new — clang error: use of undeclared identifier 'PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32')

gap_diagnosis_was_wrong: PARTIAL — the 2 codegen gaps (gpu_warp_shuffle_xor + integer /) were correctly identified by N70. N71-A's pattern-wiring (target.hexa hunk in 7671d7db) is present, but the PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32 string constant it depends on was wiped in the same commit. GAP-A is therefore NOT closed on main HEAD despite the commit subject line.

build_error.source_origin: compiler/codegen/nvptx_target.hexa:1005 emits the constant; compiler/codegen/nvptx_ptx_ops.hexa never declares it on main HEAD (wiped by 7671d7db)

follow_ons.N81_FIX: Add 1 line to compiler/codegen/nvptx_ptx_ops.hexa after line 108: `pub let PTX_OP_SHFL_SYNC_BFLY_B32: string = "shfl.sync.bfly.b32"`. Then re-run N81 workflow steps 1-4.
follow_ons.N71_B: Still needed — FP64 warp shuffle composition (deferred from N71-A originally).
